REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYANT, ADAMA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYANT, ADAMA AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-21-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TRUE. PLAINTIFF ADAMA BRYANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PATRICK CONTEH, RESIDENT MANAGER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRYANT, ADAMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
